shortTerm.title: [Compiler Bug]: eslint-plugin-react-hooks breaks the VS Code ESLint extension
Bug: `<link rel="preload" as="font" ...>` in RSC gets duplicated in SSR html
[Compiler Bug]: React Compiler does not compile module-level 'use memo' but compiles function-level 'use memo'
Bug: ViewTransition onExit cleanup not called on unmount
[Compiler Bug]: NaN in dependency list of useMemo always causes re-evaluation
Bug: useDeferredValue gets stuck with a stale value
[DevTools Bug] Could not find node with id "3119" in commit tree
Bug: Memory leak in attribute-behavior fixture - wrong variable cleared in componentWillUnmount
[eslint-plugin-react-hooks] Bug: `react-hooks/refs` rule reporting false positive
Bug: Malformed `private` field in react-devtools-fusebox package.json
[Compiler Bug]: Closure dependency cache keys eagerly evaluate property accesses, causing TypeError on nullable objects
Bug: eslint-plugin-react-hooks does not support ESLint 10 in peerDependencies
Bug: ReactProfilerTimer transition timers are global, causing conflicts with concurrent transitions
Bug: View Deployment is not working across react.dev and i18n documentation
Bug: Initialize transition start time in startTransition and startGestureTransition
[DevTools Bug] Cannot remove node "1052" because no matching node was found in the Store.
Bug: Erro: Falha ao executar 'insertBefore' em 'Node': O nó antes do qual o novo nó deve ser inserido não é filho deste nó.
Bug: React logComponentRender breaks existing functionalities that utilise proxy (trpc client)
Bug: Anchor tags do not support autoFocus
Bug: Expected a suspended thenable

Bug: Uncaught Error: Commit tree already contains fiber "725". This is a bug in React DevTools.
Bug: React DOM canary has an incorrect dependency on Scheduler
Bug: The ESLint react-hooks/preserve-manual-memoization rule warns against optional chaining operator

Bug: The ESLint react-hooks/refs rule marks the entire object with the ref property as a ref object
Bug: Support the new `<geolocation>` element

[DevTools Bug]: High CPU usage when viewing Google Search results
[Compiler Bug]: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps conflicts with idea of React compiler in terms of functions memoization
Bug: Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity in react
[Compiler Bug]: Hydration error with multiline className
Bug: Infinite loop in event listener during DOM traversal caused by nested <body> tags
Bug: React 19.2 component performance track causes side-effects in mobx -> add way to disable?

Bug: ViewTransition is not working in rtl
Bug: ViewTransition can't be isolated
Bug: React 19 does not attach custom element event listeners during hydration
[DevTools Bug] Cannot reorder children for suspense node "333" because no matching node was found in the Store.
[DevTools Bug] Commit tree already contains fiber "536". This is a bug in React DevTools.
Bug: Nested providers for the same context will lead to unnecessary render calls when only the outside context value changed  (React 19 only)
Bug: `eslint-plugin-react-hooks` hides all errors on multiple findings
[Compiler Bug]: useEffectEvent bypasses react-hooks/set-state-in-effect lint rule
[Compiler Bug]: .map() callback extracted to module scope breaks closure over locally-scoped variables
